entry.title: Welcome to the Pixore Wiki
entry.summary: We're excited to launch the Pixore documentation wiki! This is your one-stop resource for everything Pixore — from getting started to building custom nodes.
entry.content:
We're excited to launch the Pixore documentation wiki! This is your one-stop resource for everything Pixore — from getting started to building custom nodes.

What's Inside​

  • Getting Started — Installation and your first workflow
  • Module Guides — Deep dives into all eight modules
  • Node Development — Build and publish your own nodes
  • Advanced Guides — Triggers, GPU acceleration, and CLI

Stay Tuned​

We'll be posting tutorials, release notes, and community highlights here. Subscribe to the RSS feed to stay updated!
